description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The back is finished in a reflective, light-colored material and displays a prominent silver Apple logo centered below a triple-lens camera array in the upper left corner, accompanied by a flash and an additional sensor. The sides are thin and appear to be made of metal, with visible buttons and a slight camera bump on the back. The device is compact and fits comfortably in one hand, typical of high-end mobile phones. Its overall design is minimalist and premium, suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large display, triple rear cameras, and a reflective back featuring a silver Apple logo. The device has a minimalist, premium design with metallic sides and a thin profile.
description_view_0: The phone is viewed from the left edge, showing its slim profile and the slight protrusion of the rear camera bump.
description_view_1: The front view displays the large, edge-to-edge screen with a dark, abstract wallpaper and a small notch at the top.
description_view_2: The phone is viewed from the right edge, again highlighting its thinness and the camera bump on the back.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a reflective surface with a silver Apple logo and a triple camera array in the upper left corner.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, clearly visible and reflective.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a dark, abstract wallpaper with blue highlights and no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern with an adjacent flash and sensor.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the sides, likely including a power button and volume rocker, but exact details are not fully visible.
